utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Next, check whether each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance and specifies cost (575 EUR/month) — fully detailed. (2) property_coverage includes various coverage features but lacks explicit cost information — missing required cost detail. (3) travel_coverage includes feature details but also lacks cost information — missing required cost detail. (4) additional_services lists enhancement services and features but no cost — missing required cost detail. (5) total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown — fully detailed. Therefore, only health_coverage and total_budget are fully specified according to the instructions. Hence, 2 of 5 items are fully covered.
